programme.title: Whispers Of The Earth - How Our Planet Came To Be - Part 2
programme.desc: Earth influences all life on our planet. The same is true in reverse: Animals, plants, and inanimate matter also shape habitats. But humans are currently changing this dynamic cycle.

programme.title: Uganda's Urban Water Fix: Low-Cost Tech That Cleans Groundwater
programme.desc: A low-cost technology is being used to purify groundwater and recycled wastewater in Uganda. Also: Urban Nigerians embrace sack farming.

programme.title: Whispers Of The Earth - How Our Planet Came To Be - Part 2

programme.title: Uganda's Urban Water Fix: Low-Cost Tech That Cleans Groundwater
programme.desc: A low-cost technology is being used to purify groundwater and recycled wastewater in Uganda. Also: Urban Nigerians embrace sack farming.

programme.title: Ai & Drones: Possibilities And Risks
programme.desc: AI-enhanced drones are transforming warfare and how security agencies work. In Mexico, the police are using armed drones against cartels. In Ghana, authorities are using drones and AI to track down illegal gold mines.

programme.title: Could You Endure These Rites Of Passage?
programme.desc: Across Africa, coming of age can mean dangerous rites of passage. We meet boys facing deadly initiations, girls rejecting FGM, and Miss World Somalia who is turning her pain into purpose.

programme.desc: The Go Jetters get a sinking feeling when Glitch turns the canals of Venice into roads.

programme.title: E21 - Tina
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.desc: The Squirrels are rushing around, so Duggee shows them how to take a slower pace.

programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Top Chef S17E12 -Lucca
programme.desc: In a Top Chef first, the final five travel to one of the top culinary destinations in the world - Italy. First the chefs must make an apertivo for 30 locals from the town of Lucca that pairs perfectly with a Peroni beer. Then, they have the experience of a chef’s lifetime, hunting the elusive white truffle which they must use in a dish for a Tuscan food festival. There’s no room for error, as the chefs are making dishes for not just Tom, Padma and Gail but avant-garde Italian Chef Cristiano Tomei, Truffle expert Cristiano Savini and a host of locals.

programme.title: An American Girl: Chrissa Stands Strong
programme.desc: When Chrissa moves to a new school in the middle of the year, she is greeted by the girls in her fourth-grade class with teasing and tricks.

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2E13 -Food Fight!
programme.desc: It’s the return of the Top Chef Junior Food Fight! The gloves are off as the final four chefs compete in a head-to-head food fight in a boxing ring and a stadium full of fans & family members cheering them on. Over four rounds of culinary battle, the winning chefs advance and square off in the finals for the championship belt, while the losing chefs face off in a final cook for their culinary lives. Also, the tables turn when our judges pair up and step into the ring to compete in a dried chili battle of their own. The chefs take the judges’ position and hijinks ensue, but it’s not all fun and games. The competition heats up again, and so does the heat intensity of the peppers as the rounds advance. Which chefs will prove they have what it takes to cook when the pressure is turned all the way up? The heat is definitely on!

programme.title: Ruby And The Well S2E6 -I Wish They Would Just Listen
programme.desc: Ruby’s latest wish vision appears to be missing an actual wish!

Trip to Thailand
programme.desc: Is there a country where even toddlers happily eat the spiciest dishes? Our heroes travel to Thailand to find out. And Alim's penfriend Narawan prepares a spicy meal.

programme.title: Trip to Canada
programme.desc: Everybody knows that at school you learn about letters and numbers, history, poetry, and lots of other things. But in Canada, at school, you can also learn about fishing. It's time for another trip. And, of course, we will meet one of Alim's penfriends - Sakari.

programme.title: Rock Around The Clock
programme.desc: While admiring the sea life in an ocean rock pool, Darwin & Newts discover that the water level is lowering. They try to stop the leak to save the creatures, but learn that they didn't need to worry.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: Banquet
programme.desc: Howler and Dove are invited to Lord Roach's banquet. But banquets come with all kinds of rules and regulations, exposing the greedier guests in the room! Hardened foodies, they indulge in all kinds of scheming.

programme.title: The Shore
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery break into the lighthouse to find out what it's for.

programme.title: I Love Rock and Roll
programme.desc: The day Springbok discovers his echo turns out to be a lot more eventful that one would imagine.

programme.title: Hawk and the Poisoned Apples
programme.desc: The Evil Queen, aka SnowWhite's stepmother, is reformed, eager to redeem herself, and now is the new poisons teacher. Hawk and Rose have to convince the teachers the old lady is up to no good before completes her evil plan -- to kidnap Granny SnowWhite herself!

programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Utah adventure: White water rafting near Salt Lake City, bobsled racing at Utah Olympic Park, fearless rappelling in Moab, and off-the-grid dinosaur excavation. A week of thrilling escapades with Nicole and local teens in the great state of Utah!

programme.title: The Shore
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery break into the lighthouse to find out what it's for.

programme.title: Big Mean Steve
programme.desc: Robbie and Flippy plan to exploit Jessie's skateboarding skill for personal gain, but filming her tricks proves more difficult than they imagine. When they enlist little Albert to help out everything goes even more wrong.

programme.title: The Black Death
programme.desc: The Black Plague is running rampant through Europe, leaving death and destruction in its wake! This episode provides a catalog of the effects the plague has on the human body and the various weird and wonderful cures dreamed up by the contemporary medics.

programme.title: Eric Makes Paper!
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make a beautiful sheet of recycled paper. He finds out what people used to write on before paper was invented.

programme.title: Laura Biondo: Freestyle Football Champion
programme.desc: Laura Biondo holds many GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS titles, including the one for most football control tricks in one minute. Laura is a renowned football freestyler and is currently the first and only Latin American to win a football freestyle world championship.

programme.title: Eric Makes Paper!
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make a beautiful sheet of recycled paper. He finds out what people used to write on before paper was invented.

programme.title: We Can Be Heroes
programme.desc: The Acro squads are working hard to overcome injury and finesse their routines for the South West Acrobatic Championships. Meanwhile, Amelie and Phoebe have been selected to represent Great Britain at the Junior European Championships in Glasgow.

programme.title: Field of Giants
programme.desc: Fontaine and Smiling Finn get stuck inside a closing giant clam as the pirates battle the Nektons for the pearl within!

programme.title: Snot-tacular!
programme.desc: A world champion whistler pops in to help the doctors whistle – and even Billy Bones joins in! And the Cupboard of Everything is on the move again through time, landing in an operating theatre where you wouldn't want to be a patient.

programme.title: Going For Gold
programme.desc: In this episode, the female Elite team head to Brussels to battle the best artistic gymnasts in Europe at the start of the season, but for Amelie, one of the UK's brightest young stars, things take a dramatic twist.

programme.title: Eric Makes Paper!
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make a beautiful sheet of recycled paper. He finds out what people used to write on before paper was invented.

programme.title: It's Gala Time!
programme.desc: As the ice skating season draws to a close, there is the annual event in the calendar that everyone is talking about. All the Ice Stars gather together for some sensational Hollywood-themed performances. For the Icicles, it's the last time they'll skate together.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: No Foolin' Fico
programme.desc: Fico loves practical jokes. When his friend Gotcha Garcia invites them to a tomato-throwing festival, they're skeptical. Is La Tomatina a real festival? Curious, they set off to Bunol, Spain. The festival proves to be real, but Anabella won't give the tomatoes back.

programme.title: The Black Death
programme.desc: The Black Plague is running rampant through Europe, leaving death and destruction in its wake! This episode provides a catalog of the effects the plague has on the human body and the various weird and wonderful cures dreamed up by the contemporary medics.

programme.title: Cathedrals
programme.desc: If you want a cathedral, you'd better not be in a hurry! The construction site is a village in its own right, and lasts for several generations! Foreman Howler shows us round a medieval construction site, providing us with a 101 on cathedral-building techniques.

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: The pursuit of the cunning salmon turns into a voyage from the ocean through the river to the spring.

programme.title: Trip to Thailand
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are playing ping-pong when Alim arrives and they offer him a pink racket. But is pink for girls only? Alim takes them to Thailand, where they meet a boy in a pink shirt and learn that in Thailand, colors of clothing match the days of the week, not gender!

programme.title: Pilou and the Scooter Chase
programme.desc: It's Pilou's birthday, and the Buffycats surprise her with a kick scooter! Pilou is super happy, and her dog friend Terry helps her learn how to ride it. But the cat catchers trap the Buffycats! Will Pilou manage to save her furry fellows?

programme.title: Testing Team Doki
programme.desc: Oto's proud of his driving skills, so when his RC car goes haywire in the middle of a race, he's sure it's the car's fault! Why did only Oto's car break? They set off to a toy design lab, hoping to solve the mystery of what went wrong with that one car!

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: The pursuit of the cunning salmon turns into a voyage from the ocean through the river to the spring.

programme.title: Fossil Finds
programme.desc: Eric learns that fossils are like fingerprints left behind by prehistoric plants or animals. He makes some modern-day fossils using toy dinosaurs and flour.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Gorilla
programme.desc: Henry meets a Gorilla. His next door neighbour, Tiger, is feeling a little under the weather so Henry becomes a Vet to help him feel better.

programme.title: Fossil Finds
programme.desc: Eric learns that fossils are like fingerprints left behind by prehistoric plants or animals. He makes some modern-day fossils using toy dinosaurs and flour.

programme.title: Eyeball Action
programme.desc: How do you see the world in three dimensions? Find out as the doctors reveal the incredible eye muscles that control how you focus on things close-up and far away. Meanwhile, in the Emergency Department, Ted has a big cut on his head, and Millie has a sore foot.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Sports
programme.desc: A summary of world sports news of the day, both on and off the pitch.

programme.title: News[Live]
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Nightmare School Moms
programme.desc: Two mothers battle to see which of their overachieving daughters will be accepted to a prestigious university, but when one of their methods quickly spiral out of control, the games become deadly.

programme.title: E7 - High Hair, High Tea
programme.desc: While in London, Theresa visits a hatmaker to dress for high tea, and is surprised when the hatmaker turns down a reading. At tea, Theresa conducts an emotional group reading.

programme.title: Mommy Meanest
programme.desc: Madelyn and her daughter Mia have always had a tight bond. But when Mia starts spending more time with her boyfriend and is about to leave for college, Madelyn is panicked by her emerging independence.

programme.title: E7 - High Hair, High Tea
programme.desc: While in London, Theresa visits a hatmaker to dress for high tea, and is surprised when the hatmaker turns down a reading. At tea, Theresa conducts an emotional group reading.

programme.desc: Madelyn and her daughter Mia have always had a tight bond. But when Mia starts spending more time with her boyfriend and is about to leave for college, Madelyn is panicked by her emerging independence.

programme.title: E2 - Roasted Garlic And Rosemary Prime Rib
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make an impressive holiday meal that will make your guests feel like VIPs with her recipe for roasted garlic and rosemary prime rib, which she serves with her mother's special sauce.

programme.title: E2 - Roasted Garlic And Rosemary Prime Rib
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make an impressive holiday meal that will make your guests feel like VIPs with her recipe for roasted garlic and rosemary prime rib, which she serves with her mother's special sauce.

programme.title: E2 - Roasted Garlic And Rosemary Prime Rib
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make an impressive holiday meal that will make your guests feel like VIPs with her recipe for roasted garlic and rosemary prime rib, which she serves with her mother's special sauce.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Saksi
programme.desc: Brings up-to-the-minute news, relentlessly delivering breaking stories and covering live reports.

programme.title: Unang Hirit
programme.desc: A news magazine show that offers humor and information from hard news to special interests segments on travel, health, housekeeping and entertainment.

programme.title: Kapuso Mo Jessica Soho
programme.desc: Features the lighter side of veteran journalist, Jessica Soho, and highlights insightful stories of a wide range of topics

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: E161
programme.desc: “We Are One” uses a documentary shooting method, from the perspective of people, animals, and nature living in harmony, tells a touching story of cross-species, highlighting the noble sentiments of purity and kindness. programme.title: E5 - Detour
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of Australia’s shark highways. Find out if Greenly Island in the south is a truck stop for migrating great whites, then search for proof of a genetic connection between northern bull sharks and their cooler-climate cousins.

programme.title: E5 - Detour
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of Australia’s shark highways. Find out if Greenly Island in the south is a truck stop for migrating great whites, then search for proof of a genetic connection between northern bull sharks and their cooler-climate cousins.

programme.title: Boss Shark
programme.desc: Witness the ultimate battle for dominance as scientists try to pick out the alpha male in a pack of 100-plus great white sharks off the New Zealand coast. Marvel at the speed, hunting prowess, and fearlessness that determine the leader of the pack.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E4 - South America
programme.desc: Learn how South America’s rich diversity of weather fuels an even richer diversity of life. Examine the Amazon rainforest’s oxygen-breathing trees, follow the arc of a vast cloud river, and meet flamingos that thrive in the sun’s scorching UV rays.

programme.title: E5 - Detour
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of Australia’s shark highways. Find out if Greenly Island in the south is a truck stop for migrating great whites, then search for proof of a genetic connection between northern bull sharks and their cooler-climate cousins.

programme.title: E2 - Under Pressure
programme.desc: As food and water become scarce, Crystal, the fierce leader of the Ruins gang, sets her sights on rival Kati’s territory and its neighboring fruit trees. Watch as Crystal’s move and a raid by outside invaders lead to dire consequences for one troop.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals’ DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbird’s funky mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crab’s traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmon’s incredible uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: E7 - Rajan Monkey on a Mission
programme.desc: Rajan is the powerful alpha male who sits at the head of an unusually large troop. He has done well to sustain such a big group, but the future doesn’t look so bright. There are more mouths to feed, and yet his jungle home is shrinking.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E3 - Risk and Reward
programme.desc: The drought is finally over, but traversing the forest for food is still a gamble. See some leaders take the risk, leaving home territories undefended to feast on a cicada boom. When they return, trespassers are ready for a fight.

programme.title: E4 - Complete And Energy Efficient Transformation Of A House
programme.desc: Off to Schaerbeek to discover the transformation of a terraced house which, before the renovation work, was the oldest home on the street! Also featured: the Steel Sauvage ironwork workshop; the Murtoli estate in southern Corsica; repairing and repainting a brick wall.

programme.title: E65
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E16 - In Chinon (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Chinon, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the history of the region and its traditional vegetables.

programme.title: E7 - En Vadrouille Does Its Cabaret
programme.desc: In Villerest, Bijou opens the doors of his cabaret to Loic Ballet. Meryl and Victoria present him the art of wig creation, and Pascal introduces him to rare fruits.

programme.title: E4 - Complete And Energy Efficient Transformation Of A House
programme.desc: Off to Schaerbeek to discover the transformation of a terraced house which, before the renovation work, was the oldest home on the street! Also featured: the Steel Sauvage ironwork workshop; the Murtoli estate in southern Corsica; repairing and repainting a brick wall.

programme.title: E3 - Aboard The Glacier Express, From Zermatt To Saint Moritz
programme.desc: The Glacier Express lays claim to being Switzerland's slowest express train. From the Matterhorn to Engandin, it offers its passengers an unforgettable voyage between Zermatt and Saint Moritz, a journey that includes 291 bridges, 91 tunnels and a chance to appreciate some truly breathtaking scenery.

programme.title: E3 - Philippe Hardy's Manche
programme.desc: In the Bay of Mont-Saint-Michel, Michelin-starred chef Philippe Hardy takes us to explore the terroir of his Normandy. From the kitchens of his restaurant Le Mascaret, to the markets selling scallops, we join him in discovering local gastronomy and all its delights.

programme.title: E9 - 盛一倫孤軍奮戰
programme.desc: 由黎明、林依晨、魏晨、謝依霖、鄭元暢、盛一倫、朱珠、李小鵬、王濛、潘曉婷、唐曉天、陳楚河共十二位明星和奧運冠軍參加，以輪換搭檔的形式，在全球十二座體育城市展開一系列競技PK。

programme.title: E11 - 遊學團解鎖貴州
programme.desc: 以「山河即課堂，行走即成長」為主題，由何廣智、劉奕君、李雅娟、孫藝洲、楊超越組成的「非來游學團」踏入內蒙古的草原、沙漠、礦洞與峽谷，完成了一場真實、鮮活、不設腳本的人文探索，開啟一場兼具治愈感與知識性的旅程。

programme.title: E13 - 魔丸額王安宇整蠱沈騰
programme.desc: 出發團老成員沈騰、白敬亭、金晨、賈冰、胡先煦、王安宇、范丞丞攜手再次奔赴自然秘境，沉浸式領略各地的美麗風景；以「金木水火土」為主題線索，踏上野外探險之旅，將旅行與挑戰深度綁定，足跡從西藏林芝、齊齊哈爾等國內秘境延伸至海外極端環境。

programme.title: E4 - 王俊凱被逼學夾子音
programme.desc: 全明星沉浸式劇情體驗綜藝；圍繞遊戲、喜劇兩大元素，以社會熱點話題為創作基礎，打造不同遊戲主題。一個盒子空間，一群神秘玩家，他們需要在各種離奇、爆笑和反轉中，一步步揭開故事真相，走出盒子，體驗一場專屬的心靈療愈之旅。

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: 講述現代失意青年王衡意外穿越到西漢，結識了神似前女友的俠女得九，並與性格開朗的王爺劉賀成為摯友；他們試圖憑藉王衡的現代思維與知識，聯手改變劉賀悲劇性的命運，並在過程中共同成長、療愈彼此。

programme.title: E48
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.desc: The 113th Drama Serial, inspired by the lives of Koizumi Setsu and Lafcadio Hearn also known as Koizumi Yakumo, portrays those who were left behind in the rapidly Westernizing Meiji era. programme.title: E2 - The Biggest, Craziest Disasters!
programme.desc: Join Digley & Dazey as they face the biggest, craziest disasters! First, a big thunderstorm hits while the crew is working, & they have to rescue Scout after she gets trapped down a hole! Then, while working on a railway bridge, an earthquake causes it to almost fall apart, & the team must fix it before a train crosses! From escaping an avalanche they accidentally caused on a mountain to helping a baby lion that has escaped from the zoo, it's a day of big disasters!

programme.title: E1 - From Waterfalls to Outer Space!
programme.desc: Join Gecko on his biggest adventures yet, from waterfalls to outer space! First, when Grandma's caravan rolls into a river & heads for a waterfall, Gecko must perform a daring chase to save her! Then, a lovely day at the beach becomes perilous when some vehicles get caught in the tide, requiring a helicopter rescue. The adventure blasts off as the Mechs accidentally launch their homemade spaceship to the moon & need to use solar power to get home!

programme.title: E3 - Siblings Month: Creative Play Fun!
programme.desc: Get creative with JJ & his siblings! TomTom leads his lab assistants JJ & YoYo in fun science experiments, like making slime & a volcano! Then, YoYo teaches JJ how to make the perfect peanut butter & jelly sandwich. The creative fun continues as they record cool sounds with a cassette player, pretend to be a train & play a game of 'The Floor is Lava' in the living room! It's a month of imagination & creativity!

programme.title: E4 - A Guide To Fun & Healthy Days!
programme.desc: Blippi is your guide to having fun & healthy days! First, have some fun in the sun while learning from Señor Super Sunscreen how to apply sunscreen properly. Then, shrink down with Blippi & Meekah as they travel to Italy to learn how to make an authentic pizza! The adventure continues as Blippi helps a bear get ready for winter hibernation. After a long day of fun, it's time for bed, as a magical book reads a bedtime story about the benefits of a good night's rest!

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E3 - Learning, Growing & Having Fun!
programme.desc: Buster is learning, growing & having fun! First, he gets covered in mud & needs to get clean, but he's frightened by the big, noisy carwash! He has to work up the courage to try it himself. Then, after eating too many sweets, Buster gets a sore tooth & Amber the Ambulance teaches him the importance of keeping his teeth clean. In a race against Terry Tractor, Buster also learns that slow & steady can sometimes win the race!

programme.title: E2 - Let's All Help Each Other!
programme.desc: It's a day of helping each other at Lellobee City Farm! When a mama songbird's eggs are about to hatch, Mei, Ella & Rishi build her a beautiful bird feeding table so she can take care of her new chicks. Then, when Heidi the Horse is feeling down in the dumps, Ella & all the friends put on a show & give her a big group hug to make her feel happy again! The helping continues as everyone learns the importance of sharing their veggies with a visiting gopher.

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E2 - Jill's Super Creative Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Jill for some super creative adventures! It's time for the Princess Ball, & Jill decides to decorate her dress. Baby John accidentally spills paint on it, but Jill discovers that an accident can actually help creativity! Then, she decorates her shoes with sparkly stickers to make them the shiniest ever! The creative fun continues as Jill's dressed up as a pink firefighter to help her brothers & has to work hard to keep her princess bunny happy!

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E2 - From Bathtime to Bedtime Fun!
programme.desc: Go from bathtime to bedtime with Mia & Max! The fun starts with a splashy, bubbly good time as the kids play with their rubber ducks & get nice & clean in the tub. After the bath, it's time to get into pajamas & play a fun game of Peek-a-boo with Mummy using lots of different objects from around the house. Finally, it's time for bed as Daddy & Ella take turns giving Max a cuddle & a teddy bear before he goes to sleep. Night night!

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!

Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns to do the right thing! When Buster accidentally breaks the class flower, he panics & tries to cover it up, but soon learns that telling the truth is always the best thing to do. Then, when he & Daddy spot a steam train speeding out of control, they know they have to do the right thing! They race after the train & save the day! From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: E3 - Dinos, Ducks & More Animal Friends!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he meets dinos, ducks & more animal friends! First, he & his friends visit Old MacDonald's farm to learn about all the animals & count all his vegetables. Then, after finding different animal toys inside surprise eggs, Baby John & his friends have fun mixing them up & creating their own crazy creatures! The animal fun continues as Miss Hannah uses a fun deck of cards to teach the kids about animals & the sounds they make.

programme.title: E2 - The Biggest, Craziest Disasters!
programme.desc: Join Digley & Dazey as they face the biggest, craziest disasters! First, a big thunderstorm hits while the crew is working, & they have to rescue Scout after she gets trapped down a hole! Then, while working on a railway bridge, an earthquake causes it to almost fall apart, & the team must fix it before a train crosses! From escaping an avalanche they accidentally caused on a mountain to helping a baby lion that has escaped from the zoo, it's a day of big disasters!

programme.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Jade Barker.

programme.title: E1 - The Power/Dizzy/The Best Burger In The World/Cool Cubed/Expert Or Liar
programme.desc: Rigby steals a magic keyboard from a preoccupied sorcerer. When Mordecai and Rigby accidentally make a hole in the wall while wrestling a stuffed animal, they use the keyboard to make Pops and Benson give them raises to try to pay for it.

programme.title: E101 - Princess Buttercup/Horn, Sweet Horn/The Stayover/The Wrinklegruff Gals/Strong Armed
programme.desc: When Buttercup starts spending a lot of time with her new friends, a group of bad-girl skaters called The Derbytantes, it seems the Powerpuff Girls are down to two, which delights Princess Morbucks, who wants to fill the empty slot.

programme.title: E177 - The Ghouls/The Bffs/The Agent/The Decisions/The Web
programme.desc: It's Halloween in Elmore. As the kids go trick or treating we see what everyone in town is up to. The ghosts and ghouls are finding it increasingly difficult to scare children, and are only scaring part-time. Can Gumball and Darwin help them get their scare back?

programme.title: E24 - A. The Words/The Apology/The Skull/Christmas/The Watch
programme.desc: Darwin is too polite to speak his mind, so Gumball teaches him to be direct via an epic battle of insults.

programme.title: E24 - Lalique Museum/Olivier Polge/Pharrell Williams/Aurore Mazeres
programme.desc: In Wingen-sur-Moder, the Musee Lalique presents the abundant work of Rene Lalique and his successors. Olivier Polge is the perfumer for Chanel. For Vuitton, Pharrell Williams breaks down the boundaries between music, fashion and art. Aurore Mazeres carries on the skills of five generations of upholsterers who preceded her.

programme.title: E41 - It's A Dog's Cheese
programme.desc: 52 before JC. The city of Lutecia is occupied by the Romans... Completely? No! A gang of invincible animals led by Idefix resist the invader again and again and its plans to romanise the city.

programme.title: E2 - The Key
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

Autumn Tale
programme.desc: A wine producer in the south of France. She's a widow, and her best friend, Isabelle, decides to find her a new husband.

programme.title: Award-winning Tuesday: Drive My Car
programme.desc: Yusuke Kafuku is a stage actor and director happily married to his playwright wife. Then one day she disappears.

programme.title: Shaurya Aur Anokhi Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Shaurya, a male chauvinist who believes that every girl's future belongs in the kitchen, is in for a surprise when he crosses paths with Anokhi, a hardworking girl.

programme.title: Saraswati Chandra
programme.desc: Saraswati Chandra calls off his marriage with Kumud, eventually leading to her being married off to a drunkard. Years later, Kumud, now a widow, comes face-to-face with Saraswati.

programme.title: E205 - Dude, Where's My Man Buggy?
programme.desc: When Danger Force borrows Ray's beloved Man Buggy without permission it falls into the hands of criminals Stupid Jeff and The Toddler. Now the team must track it down and get it back before Ray finds out.

programme.title: E203 - Raph Fights Everyone
programme.desc: With all his family and friends under Kitsune's mind control, Raph no longer wants to fight in the Mutant Battle Arena. But he'll have to (with Pigeon Pete's help) in order to save EVERYONE he loves before it's too late!

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E219 - Man Ray Returns / Larry the Floor Manager
programme.desc: When Man Ray rents Squidward's house for the weekend, it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to stop his evil vacation! // Mr. Krabs takes a vacation and makes Larry the Lobster the temporary manager of the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: E221 - No Pictures, Please / Stuck on the Roof
programme.desc: Patrick leads an enthusiastic stranger on a tour of his favorite places in Bikini Bottom. // SpongeBob is afraid to get off the roof of the Krusty Krab, but he won't let that stop him from living his life!

programme.title: E209 - Summer Chuseok / Putting Up with the Plovers
programme.desc: In an attempt to get out of the dentist, Lily insists on a summer celebration of the fall holiday Chuseok. // When Will accidentally befriends an annoying man, his sorry attempts at a break-up make things painfully awkward for the whole family.

programme.title: E201 - Beck Falls for Tori
programme.desc: Tori auditions for a role in a movie. But after exaggerating on her resume, she gets hired as a stunt double. When Tori finds out her stunt is falling off a building, she's not sure she can do it.

programme.title: E205 - The Other Mutanimals
programme.desc: Desperate to save Wingnut from Tokka, Rahzar, & the Monster Mutanimals, Donnie delves deeper into the lab of a mad scientist. Meanwhile, his brothers follow another Tokka to the Staten Island lab... only for things to take a disastrous turn!

programme.title: E195 - SpongeBob LongPants / Larry’s Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways. // When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: E203 - Raph Fights Everyone
programme.desc: With all his family and friends under Kitsune's mind control, Raph no longer wants to fight in the Mutant Battle Arena. But he'll have to (with Pigeon Pete's help) in order to save EVERYONE he loves before it's too late!

programme.title: E224 - Squid Noir / Scavenger Pants
programme.desc: When his clarinet goes missing, Squidward must become a hardboiled detective to track it down. // Squidward sends SpongeBob and Patrick on an increasingly difficult scavenger hunt to get them out of his hair.

programme.desc: In an attempt to get out of the dentist, Lily insists on a summer celebration of the fall holiday Chuseok. // When Will accidentally befriends an annoying man, his sorry attempts at a break-up make things painfully awkward for the whole family.

programme.title: E107 - Picture Perfect / Undie Pressure
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to take the 'perfect' family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. // Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

programme.title: E108 - #TextingCompetition
programme.desc: Cat discovers Sam is really fast at texting and convinces her to compete in a texting competition against a sweet boy, Butler, who has an overbearing mom. Dice tries to avoid an annoying old friend.

programme.title: E214 - Out of the Picture / Room with a Feud

E4
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 在華麗成功的三位朋友面前，出現一位 10 年前因她們的謊言而成為殺人犯的老朋友，她為揭開三人隱藏在假面之下的真面目而決定背水一戰。而四位老朋友也因一位男人面臨人生漩渦，彼此展開關乎嫉妒和慾望戰爭的故事。

programme.title: E13 - Phillippe and Terrie With Rose
programme.desc: Terrie and Philippe are looking for a four-bedroom home for their blended family, but in Dawson City, a town of less than 1,500 people; do they have a better chance of finding gold than a house?

programme.title: E1 - Trial by Fire
programme.desc: The Darnell’s 9-month show tour begins in Cayuga as Driver, Chris prepares rookie, Wayner for his first show as Shockwave's solo-Crew Chief, a role that could literally be the difference between life or death for Chris.

programme.title: E2 - You Play With Fire, You Might Get Burned
programme.desc: Tensions mount in Cayuga as a frightening crash occurs on the drag strip moments before Chris is set to perform his incredibly dangerous first night race of the season alongside his still untested Crew Chief, Wayner.

programme.title: E13 - Phillippe and Terrie With Rose
programme.desc: Terrie and Philippe are looking for a four-bedroom home for their blended family, but in Dawson City, a town of less than 1,500 people; do they have a better chance of finding gold than a house?

programme.title: E2 - You Play With Fire, You Might Get Burned

programme.title: E3 - Always Bet on Dot
programme.desc: Once homeless and a teen-mom, Dot leaves the big city for a much needed adventure alongside Bear Grylls. She's overcome life's biggest challenges but has never tackled the wild. Her emotional journey is a truly inspiring tale of survival.

programme.title: E3 - Bear in Focus
programme.desc: A family of black bears are studied in the forested hills of Oklahoma.

programme.title: E1 - Excavator vs. Safe
programme.desc: Episode 101 of Showdown of the Unbeatables features BCB Air Cannon vs. Line X coating; an automated paintball turret vs. a worlds record holding slingshot marksman; and the RX Rock Breaker vs. the inpenetrable Brown Safe.

programme.title: E5 - Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess visits Northstar Bison to learn about the small family-run ranch's breeding and processing operation, then prepares her signature smash burger.

programme.title: E6 - Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess heads to Oklahoma, where she takes aim at one of the state's estimated 1.5 million feral hogs.

programme.title: E3 - The Payoff
programme.desc: The rainy season begins and the problems escalate. The team must devise new strategies to safeguard the equipment and prevent it from being washed away by the daily thunderstorms.

programme.title: E14 - Columbia
programme.desc: Catfish and Rooftop go on a mission with the Colombian military's anti-narcotics division, test bulletproof clothing on themselves and experience the most painful insect sting in the world.

programme.title: E13 - Phillippe and Terrie With Rose

programme.title: E13 - Phillippe and Terrie With Rose
programme.desc: Terrie and Philippe are looking for a four-bedroom home for their blended family, but in Dawson City, a town of less than 1,500 people; do they have a better chance of finding gold than a house?

programme.title: Sanju
programme.desc: Sanjay Dutt works his way to success while battling substance abuse and legal turmoil.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E222 -Rob N Roll
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Keep Chasing: Hunt
programme.desc: After a high-ranking North Korean official requests asylum, KCIA Foreign Unit chief Park Pyong-ho (LEE Jung Jae) and Domestic Unit chief Kim Jung-do (JUNG Woo Sung) are tasked with uncovering a North Korean spy, known as Donglim, who is deeply embedded within their agency. When the spy begins leaking top secret intel that could jeopardize national security, the two units are each assigned to investigate each other. In this tense situation where if they cannot find the mole, they may be accused themselves, Pyong-ho and Jung-do slowly start to uncover the truth. In the end, they must deal with an unthinkable plot to assassinate the South Korean president...

programme.title: The Last Tycoon
programme.desc: It was 1917, China. CHENG was an innocent young man who worked in a grocery store and had no ambition, other than to be with his lovely neighbour, the Peking Opera student QIU. But a fateful night had changed Cheng's life forever, as he literally walked right in the affair between his lady boss and the chief of police. To hide this secret, the chief decided to throw Cheng into prison, accusing him of raping his lady boss. Desolated, Cheng met a cellmate MAO, who happened to have an escape plan. The duo broke out, and Cheng had no choice but to leave his life, and his dream girl behind...

programme.title: Innovation In Sync, Pioneering The Front!
programme.desc: Innovation in Sync, Pioneering the Front! 'The Frontiers' is your direct link to innovation, powered by the Shenzhen Media Group's AI Lab and China's largest AI models. Get the lowdown on groundbreaking trends-it's all here, served fresh and hot. With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! This program will start in May 27th, tune in every night at 21:20 for a riveting 15-minute exploration.

programme.desc: Zhi Financial News is a daily news program on Shenzhen TV. The 10-minute show covers global financial headlines and offers authoritative insights into the latest economic trends.

programme.title: The Super Launching
programme.desc: The Super Launching is a geek program in the realm of popular science. Dedicated to showcasing new technologies, achievements, and breakthroughs from around the world, the program focuses on both highlighting existing hot topics and generating new ones, offering the audience a glimpse into the latest popular science and industry developments. Anchored in an innovative city with a global perspective, the Super Launching has established itself as the best platform for global premieres, debuts, and the launch of first stores.

Dedicated to showcasing new technologies, achievements, and breakthroughs from around the world, the program focuses on both highlighting existing hot topics and generating new ones, offering the audience a glimpse into the latest popular science and industry developments. Anchored in an innovative city with a global perspective, the Super Launching has established itself as the best platform for global premieres, debuts, and the launch of first stores.

programme.title: Innovation In Sync, Pioneering The Front!
programme.desc: Innovation in Sync, Pioneering the Front! 'The Frontiers' is your direct link to innovation, powered by the Shenzhen Media Group's AI Lab and China's largest AI models. Get the lowdown on groundbreaking trends-it's all here, served fresh and hot. With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! This program will start in May 27th, tune in every night at 21:20 for a riveting 15-minute exploration.
